How it works

Three steps to the right placement

Step one

Tell us what's needed

Text or call with details on care level, budget, and preferred location — no paperwork to start.

Step two

Get matched

We connect your family with assisted living communities in the Tampa Bay area that genuinely fit those needs.

Step three

Tour and decide

Visit your matched communities and choose with confidence — at no cost or obligation to your family.

For assisted living communities

Reach families who are actively searching

Shalom Vida provides targeted marketing services that connect your community with families ready to make a placement decision in the Tampa Bay area.

No upfront cost

Marketing services are structured around results — a marketing fee applies only when a placement is completed.

Qualified families

We work with families who are actively searching — not browsing — so your team spends time on serious inquiries.

Local Tampa Bay focus

We market exclusively within Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties — the communities you actually serve.

Simple partnership

No paperwork barriers to getting started. Reach out and we'll walk you through how we work together.

Become a Marketing Partner

Why families choose Shalom Vida

Placement help, without the runaround

Free for families

Our service costs your family nothing. We are compensated by the assisted living community through a marketing fee — never by you.

Local Tampa Bay knowledge

We know the communities across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties — not a national call-center list.

Personalized matching

We take time to understand your loved one's care needs, budget, and preferences before recommending any community.
